title: Ph.D. in Management
blurb: For the scholar-practitioner. Our doctoral fellows publish in peer-reviewed journals and shape policy at India's central institutions. Cohorts deliberately small.
lead: Our doctoral programme is, by design, small. Each fellow is admitted only after a defended research proposal and an interview with the doctoral committee. Areas of guidance include strategic management, financial economics, marketing, organizational behaviour, and operations research.
body: Doctoral fellows are expected to publish in peer-reviewed journals during their candidature. The institute provides full library access, conference travel funding, and a teaching fellowship that includes a stipend and tutorial responsibilities.
eligibility: Postgraduate degree with 55%+ · UGC NET / SET / equivalent
tuitionLine: Stipend available for full-time fellows; details on enquiry
